_comment: Fixture from gh pr view <number> --repo <owner>/<repo> --json comments,reviews

comments.body:
This issue is currently awaiting triage.

If a SIG or subproject determines this is a relevant issue...

reviews.body: Thanks for putting this together — the flattened shape mirroring `projectItems` reads well...

_field_notes.comments_are_issue_comments: comments[] is issue-level comments (not inline review comments); inline review comments come from gh api repos/.../pulls/.../comments
_field_notes.author_is_object: author is {login: string}, not a plain string
